1.title: Mobile App Developer (Agentic Coding Contractor)
1.Description:
● Owned end-to-end development of a cross-platform Android/iOS application as the sole developer, using Cursor as an AI-assisted coding environment to accelerate delivery.
● Integrated a Google image-processing model and an in-house ONNX computer-vision model into a single real-time on-device inference pipeline.

2.title: Senior Developer
2.Description:
● Drive end-to-end development, support, and release execution across two core insurance systems: a legacy .NET Framework application and a modern cloud-native ecosystem built on a 5-microservice .NET Core backend with a React frontend.
● Develop and test a new AI-assisted insurance platform using Next.js, Node.js (Express), Azure Cosmos DB, Azure Blob Storage, and the OpenAI SDK, built with Claude Code as the primary development tool.
● Provide technical governance by reviewing the architecture and code contributions of peer Senior Developers, and established developer guidelines via 'claude.md' to integrate agentic AI coding tools — including Claude Code and GitHub Copilot — into the team's workflow.
● Own cloud infrastructure on AWS, including AWS API Gateway orchestration, AWS Parameter Store configuration, and EC2 deployments with CI/CD via GitHub Actions and AWS CodePipeline/CodeCommit.
● Led the migration of the legacy codebase from SVN to GitHub and actively guide Agile ceremonies — stand-ups, backlog grooming, sprint refinements — to maintain high delivery velocity.

● Optimized a global contingent workforce system by contributing to the Vue 3 migration, resulting in a 25% increase in frontend rendering performance.
● Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver scalable solutions across a complex Oracle and SQL Server database landscape.
